mapper.select: SELECT cik, manager_name, short_name, active, priority FROM institution_13f_manager WHERE active = TRUE ORDER BY priority, manager_name LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO institution_13f_filing ( accession_number, manager_cik, manager_name, form_type, report_quarter, report_date, filing_date, information_table_url, status, raw_json, fetched_at ) VALUES ( #{accessionNumber}, #{managerCik}, #{managerName}, #{formType}, #{reportQuarter}, #{reportDate}, #{filingDate}, #{informationTableUrl}, #{status}, #{rawJson}, #{fetchedAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE manager_cik = VALUES(manager_cik), manager_name = VALUES(manager_name), form_type = VALUES(form_type), report_quarter = VALUES(report_quarter), report_date = VALUES(report_date), filing_date = VALUES(filing_date), information_table_url = COALESCE(VALUES(information_table_url), information_table_url), status = VALUES(status), raw_json = VALUES(raw_json), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
mapper.update: UPDATE institution_13f_filing SET status = #{status}, information_table_url = COALESCE(#{informationTableUrl}, information_table_url), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE accession_number = #{accessionNumber}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO institution_13f_holding ( accession_number, manager_cik, manager_name, report_quarter, issuer_name, title_of_class, cusip, value_usd_thousands, shares, share_type, put_call, investment_discretion, other_manager, voting_sole, voting_shared, voting_none, symbol, mapped_by, raw_xml, fetched_at ) VALUES
( #{holding.accessionNumber}, #{holding.managerCik}, #{holding.managerName}, #{holding.reportQuarter}, #{holding.issuerName}, #{holding.titleOfClass}, #{holding.cusip}, #{holding.valueUsdThousands}, #{holding.shares}, #{holding.shareType}, #{holding.putCall}, #{holding.investmentDiscretion}, #{holding.otherManager}, #{holding.votingSole}, #{holding.votingShared}, #{holding.votingNone}, #{holding.symbol}, #{holding.mappedBy}, #{holding.rawXml}, #{holding.fetchedAt} )
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE manager_cik = VALUES(manager_cik), manager_name = VALUES(manager_name), report_quarter = VALUES(report_quarter), value_usd_thousands = VALUES(value_usd_thousands), shares = VALUES(shares), symbol = VALUES(symbol), mapped_by = VALUES(mapped_by), raw_xml = VALUES(raw_xml), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
mapper.select: SELECT p.symbol, p.name AS companyName, UPPER( REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE( COALESCE(p.name, p.symbol), '.', ''), ',', ''), '-', ' '), '&', ' AND '), ' INCORPORATED', ''), ' INC', ''), ' CORP', ''), ' CORPORATION', ''), ' CLASS A', '') ) AS normalizedName FROM company_profile p JOIN stock_symbol s ON s.symbol = p.symbol AND s.active = TRUE JOIN ( SELECT DISTINCT symbol FROM index_constituent WHERE current_member = TRUE AND index_code IN ('SP500', 'NASDAQ100', 'DOW30') ) universe ON universe.symbol = p.symbol WHERE p.symbol IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stock_institution_flow_quarterly ( symbol, report_quarter, holder_count, total_value_usd_thousands, total_shares, previous_total_value_usd_thousands, previous_total_shares, value_change_pct, shares_change_pct, net_shares_change, top_manager_name, top_manager_value_usd_thousands, source_filing_count, mapped_holding_count, fetched_at ) SELECT current_flow.symbol, current_flow.report_quarter, current_flow.holder_count, current_flow.total_value_usd_thousands, current_flow.total_shares, previous_flow.total_value_usd_thousands, previous_flow.total_shares, CASE WHEN previous_flow.total_value_usd_thousands IS NULL OR previous_flow.total_value_usd_thousands = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((current_flow.total_value_usd_thousands - previous_flow.total_value_usd_thousands) / previous_flow.total_value_usd_thousands) * 100 END, CASE WHEN previous_flow.total_shares IS NULL OR previous_flow.total_shares = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ((current_flow.total_shares - previous_flow.total_shares) / previous_flow.total_shares) * 100 END, CASE WHEN previous_flow.total_shares IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE current_flow.total_shares - previous_flow.total_shares END, top_flow.manager_name, top_flow.manager_value_usd_thousands, current_flow.source_filing_count, current_flow.mapped_holding_count, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM ( SELECT symbol, report_quarter, COUNT(DISTINCT manager_cik) AS holder_count, SUM(value_usd_thousands) AS total_value_usd_thousands, SUM(shares) AS total_shares, COUNT(DISTINCT accession_number) AS source_filing_count, COUNT(*) AS mapped_holding_count FROM institution_13f_holding WHERE report_quarter = #{reportQuarter} AND symbol IS NOT NULL AND (put_call IS NULL OR UPPER(put_call) NOT IN ('PUT', 'CALL')) GROUP BY symbol, report_quarter ) current_flow LEFT JOIN stock_institution_flow_quarterly previous_flow ON previous_flow.symbol = current_flow.symbol AND previous_flow.report_quarter = ( SELECT MAX(prev.report_quarter) FROM stock_institution_flow_quarterly prev WHERE prev.symbol = current_flow.symbol AND prev.report_quarter < current_flow.report_quarter ) LEFT JOIN ( SELECT ranked.symbol, ranked.report_quarter, ranked.manager_name, ranked.manager_value_usd_thousands FROM ( SELECT h.symbol, h.report_quarter, h.manager_name, SUM(h.value_usd_thousands) AS manager_value_usd_thousands, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY h.symbol, h.report_quarter ORDER BY SUM(h.value_usd_thousands) DESC, h.manager_name ) AS row_num FROM institution_13f_holding h WHERE h.report_quarter = #{reportQuarter} AND h.symbol IS NOT NULL AND (h.put_call IS NULL OR UPPER(h.put_call) NOT IN ('PUT', 'CALL')) GROUP BY h.symbol, h.report_quarter, h.manager_name ) ranked WHERE ranked.row_num = 1 ) top_flow ON top_flow.symbol = current_flow.symbol AND top_flow.report_quarter = current_flow.report_quarter ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE holder_count = VALUES(holder_count), total_value_usd_thousands = VALUES(total_value_usd_thousands), total_shares = VALUES(total_shares), previous_total_value_usd_thousands = VALUES(previous_total_value_usd_thousands), previous_total_shares = VALUES(previous_total_shares), value_change_pct = VALUES(value_change_pct), shares_change_pct = VALUES(shares_change_pct), net_shares_change = VALUES(net_shares_change), top_manager_name = VALUES(top_manager_name), top_manager_value_usd_thousands = VALUES(top_manager_value_usd_thousands), source_filing_count = VALUES(source_filing_count), mapped_holding_count = VALUES(mapped_holding_count), fetched_at = VALUES(fetched_at)
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM stock_institution_flow_quarterly WHERE symbol = #{symbol} ORDER BY report_quarter DESC LIMIT 1
